title: catananche lutea subsp. carpholepis
intro: Catananche lutea subsp. carpholepis, also known as the yellow knapweed or lesser knapweed, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Catananche lutea subsp. carpholepis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
